metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_3728
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 7: highly purified synaptic vesicles obtained by controlled pore-glass chromatography showed that SVOP proteins are highly enriched in synaptic vesicles (similar as the homologous SV2 proteins)

Figure 8: immunoprecipitations of synaptic vesicles from brain homogenates with beads coated with antibodies to synaptotagmin and synaptobrevin showed SVOP co-immunoprecipitation

19/6/2018 Pim
- Based on the known transmembrane topology of the protein, the "integral component of ... membrane" term was chosen.. Experimental description: M&M: RAT brain fractionations were performed essentially as described by Huttner et al. (1983)
